chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 910 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِذَا تَغَوَّلَتْ لَكُمُ اَلْغُولُ فَأَذِّنُوا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.910 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"If a ghoul appears to you, then perform the adhan (call to prayer)."
